spec.name: Soul Dampen Point
spec.summary: Reduces soul flux as a point focus at long reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Reduces soul flux as a point focus at long reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions. A circle dampen/affect recipe that channels soul discipline into soul output. It applies a point pattern against object across long reach with immediate persistence.
